name: Shuttle Car (low bed + end trunks)
status: Form per Mike 2026-06-05: low nested IDBM bed between two tall end trunks (set back by trunk.gap) + centre Lidar both ends; widest part = the IDBM ends. Cosmetic dims assumed.

params.desc: IDBM length = bed depth (local Y); the IDBM ends are the widest part.
Deck (IDBM body-rest) height. IDBM nests low so IDBM-top = chassis.height + 85; min 125 -> 210 mm.
How far each trunk extends in X.
Clearance gap between the last IDBM and the trunk (so the trunk doesn't interfere with products entering/exiting).
Trunk Y-width = idbmLength - this (slightly SHORTER than the IDBM ends).
Laneway clearance berth for the Configurator footprint (NOT drawn in the Viewer).

bed.note: bed = laneCount IDBM instances; obey normal IDBM op rules.

kinematics.note: Rail-bound; linear travel along X on a single central floor rail. Symmetric (a trunk + Lidar at each end) — travels both ways. Belt deck conveys ACROSS travel (Y).

derived.vehicle.width(Y): idbmLength (IDBM ends; trunks are idbmLength - trunk.widthInset)
derived.laneway: Configurator-only: footprint swept along travel (X) +/- clearance.berth (see laneway2D). NOT rendered in the Viewer.

geometry.note: Low nested IDBM bed between two tall end trunks. Drawn far-trunk -> bed -> near-trunk so nothing dark overpaints the IDBMs.
geometry.frame: Datum = chassis pose {position,yaw}. local X = travel/side-by-side; local Y = IDBM length; Z up.
geometry.deck: Low slab from trunk to trunk (X = laneCount x 300 + 2 x trunk.gap ; Y = IDBM body length) at chassis.height; IDBM bodies rest on it, end housings overhang in Y.
geometry.trunks: two boxes set back by trunk.gap: inner face at laneCount x 300/2 + trunk.gap; each trunk.depth (X) x (idbmLength - trunk.widthInset) (Y) x trunk.height tall.
geometry.lidar: a sensor on the OUTER (+/-X) face centre of each trunk (both ends).
geometry.bed: laneCount IDBMs at 300 mm pitch along X; each idbmLength along Y; nested low (IDBM-top = chassis.height + 85).
geometry.rule: Widest part (Y) = the IDBM ends. The cart may be longer in X than the outer IDBMs. IDBM module FIXED (300 wide, 200 high, body underside 115).

connectionPoints.desc: -Y bed edge: lane endA's meet a storage lane for transfer.
+Y bed edge: lane endB's meet a storage lane for transfer.
Shuttle datum (chassis pose); rides a single central rail along X.

meta.author: component-authoring session (parallel)
meta.form: low nested IDBM bed between two tall end trunks (set back by trunk.gap) + centre Lidar each end
meta.colours: Trunks/deck dark + Safety-Orange cap; Lidar grey housing + teal window; IDBMs unchanged.
references: Mike's notes 2026-06-05 (end trunks, gap, Lidar, widest = IDBM ends)
meta.remainingAssumptions: trunk.height/depth/gap/widthInset, chassis.height, drive/sensor detail. Appearance to be revisited.
